name: Tomb of Hope
short_description: Something strange is happening in the newly discovered tomb. One of the archaeologists went missing during the exploration and even a search party was not able to help. Will you find her? What is happening in the dark depths? And are you really the only one here?
detailed_description:
Something strange is happening in the newly discovered tomb. One of the archaeologists went missing during the exploration and even a search party was not able to help. Will you find her? What is happening in the dark depths? And are you really the only one here?

Tomb of Hope is a horror walking simulator game set in the atmosphere of the Egyptian tomb.

Features
Old horror games vibe

Mysterious story

Thoughtful sound design

Three different endings

Atmospheric effects
about_the_game:

supported_languages: English, Russian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
